blended.narrative: Palisades Tahoe is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Mild temps with highs near 58°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 25".
